Top Review

"Vegamarcon made our first home purchase completely stress-free. The pricing was 100% transparent, and they helped us with the entire home loan process. Handed over 15 days before the committed date — something unheard of in Bangalore real estate."

R
Rahul & Priya Sharma
Software Engineer, Wipro
Vega Heights Phase I · Whitefield

"Booked Marcon Elite after one site visit. No hidden charges at the end. Their home loan tie-up with HDFC got us approval in 4 working days. Highly recommend for IT corridor buyers."

A
Arun Mehta
Senior Manager, TCS
Marcon Elite · Sarjapur Road

"We were NRI buyers worried about managing a purchase from Dubai. Vegamarcon's team handled everything — legal docs, loan, registration. The entire purchase was done in 3 weeks. Seamless."

S
Suresh & Kavitha Nair
NRI Buyers, Dubai
Vega Greens Phase I · Bellandur
First-Time Buyer

"The RERA registration number was shared upfront before I even asked. No pressure sales — they gave me 2 weeks to decide. Got the keys exactly on the promised date. Build quality genuinely surprised me."

D
Deepika Reddy
Product Manager, Amazon
Marcon Vista · Electronic City

"Site visit was professional — no pushy tactics. Monthly construction updates via WhatsApp kept us informed throughout. This is what transparent real estate should look like."

K
Karthik & Meena Iyer
Chartered Accountant
Vega Heights · Whitefield

"Compared 6 builders before deciding. Vegamarcon was the only one who gave a cost sheet breakdown without me asking. Post-handover support team responded within 24 hours every single time."

V
Vikram Shetty
Engineering Lead, Infosys
Marcon Elite · Sarjapur Road
